tagline: Patch leaks before your money slips away.

designSystem.style: Dark fintech UI with teal/purple accent palette, card-based layout, data visualization, behavior cluster grids, and micro-interaction toggles. Combines urgency indicators (red leak dots, critical badges) with motivational recovery metrics (score ring, progress bars).

screens: Home – Recovery score card with count-up animation, urgent alerts panel, behavior cluster grid, and top leaks preview
Leaks – Sortable list of detected money leaks with severity badges, expandable detail cards, and one-tap patch actions
Patch – Recovery roadmap with checkbox progress tracking, difficulty tags, and auto-patch opt-in banner
Insights – Bar chart trend visualization, habit cluster breakdown with weekly day-grid heatmap, and next-month forecast
Profile – Connected accounts manager, notification preference toggles, and impact stats summary
